---
title: "ED Fig 11d-f - EB3 length under CK-666 (DIV-2, raw images)"
author: "Lin et al., Nature 2026 (Bradke lab, DZNE)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  div: 2
  image_pipeline: "raw"
  summary_variable: "growth_speed_median"
  pdf_name: "EB3_length.eps"
  d_drive_source: "D:\\DVElite\\CK666_LA_EB3\\240225_DIV2_EB3\\ck666\\raw\\read_stat.Rmd"
---

<!--
================================================================================
  Wrapper for ED Fig 11d-f, batch: DIV-2 + raw (non-deconvolved) images.
================================================================================
  Includes canonical template at:
      ../../templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - div = 2                              -> Days-in-vitro 2 stage
    - image_pipeline = "raw"               -> str_extract uses "(?<=raw/)..."
    - summary_variable = "growth_speed_median"  -> per-cell EB3 metric for the panel
    - pdf_name = "EB3_length.eps"          -> ggsave filename for the panel
    - d_drive_source                       -> D:\ provenance (audit-only)

  Original 262-line monolithic wrapper extracted into a canonical template
  on 2026-05-12. See ``templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd`` for
  the full analysis logic.

  Essentiality: Replicate-QC. Canonical for the published consolidator:
                edfig11f_eb3_tip_integrated_intensity.Rmd.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd"}
```
